nf/quick-337-fast-path-initial-diagnosti.task_description: Add autoresearch-style iteration to formal model refinement: one model tweak per iteration, mechanical verification, git-as-memory, atomic rollback, TSV logging
nf/quick-337-fast-path-initial-diagnosti.approach: Implement autoresearch-style iteration for formal model refinement with mechanical verification, git rollback capability, and TSV logging of each model tweak.
out_of_scope: Multi-model simultaneous tweaks or batch refinement
Interactive user feedback loops during iteration
Visualization or graphical diff tools for model changes
Integration with external formal verification tools beyond current infrastructure
